450 WGSS - Women, Gender, and Sexuality Studies

WGSS425 Gender Roles and Social Institutions (3 Credits) Relationship between gender roles and the structure of one or more social institutions (e.g., the economy, the family, the political system, religion, education). The incorporation of gender roles into social institutions; perpetuation or transformation of sex roles by social institutions; how changing gender roles affect social institutions. Credit Only Granted for. SOCY425, WMST425 or WGSS425.
